references.title: 8 Best Smart Thermostats of 2026, Lab-Tested and Reviewed
Best Smart Thermostats 2026
The Best Thermostat | Lab Tested & Ranked
Best Matter-Compatible Smart Thermostats in 2026
Nest Learning Thermostat (4th gen) review

en.commentary:
The smart thermostat market in 2026 has a clear leader: the Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium. At $249, it does more than control your heating and cooling — it monitors indoor air quality, listens for smoke alarms, doubles as a security hub, and includes a SmartSensor to handle the hot and cold spots that most homes have. I put it first because no other thermostat bundles this many genuinely useful features at a price that is still reasonable for what you get.

The Google Nest Learning Thermostat (4th gen) earns the second spot for one reason that matters more than any feature list: it actually learns. Within a week of installation, it builds a schedule based on when you're home and what temperatures you prefer. Most people never fully program a thermostat. The Nest removes that friction entirely. It also ships with a Nest Temperature Sensor in the box, is fully Matter-certified, and has the best-looking display in this category. The $279.99 price is the highest here, but the justification is clear.

If you have a large home with uneven temperatures, the Honeywell Home T9 is the right answer. Supporting up to 20 wireless sensors at a 200-foot range, it is the only thermostat in this group designed around the reality that a single thermostat reading does not represent what is actually happening across a multi-room house. Its auto-scheduling is less sophisticated than Ecobee or Nest, but the room-level control it provides compensates for that.

The Amazon Smart Thermostat at $79.99 is the honest budget pick. It will not impress anyone with its display or feature set, but the Alexa Hunches integration — where it adjusts based on whether you are home, asleep, or away — delivers the core value of a smart thermostat without requiring you to spend $200 or more. For a second home, a rental, or anyone who simply wants remote control and basic scheduling, it earns its place.

highlights.title: Ecobee Premium is the most complete package at $249
highlights.body: Most thermostats do one thing well. The Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium does six. Built-in Alexa and Siri voice control, air quality monitoring that tells you when to change your filter, smoke alarm detection, SmartSensor for room-level temperature balancing, and a security hub that integrates with Alexa Guard. The included SmartSensor alone is a $79 add-on with competing products. At $249, Ecobee is not asking you to pay a premium without justification — the value is there in the box.

highlights.title: The Nest Learning Thermostat's auto-learning is genuinely useful, not a gimmick
highlights.body: Auto-learning thermostats have been around for over a decade, but the 4th gen Nest executes it better than any previous version. The new Adaptive Comfort setting adjusts target temperatures based on real-time humidity levels and weather forecasts, not just your stored schedule. The Sunblock feature detects when direct sunlight is hitting the thermostat and compensates for the false reading. These are not marketing bullets — they are the kind of details that make a thermostat's automatic decisions feel correct rather than frustrating. Matter certification means this device is fully compatible with Apple Home, Google Home, Alexa, and SmartThings without any workarounds.

highlights.title: Matter compatibility reshapes how I evaluate smart thermostats in 2026
highlights.body: In 2026, Matter is no longer a future consideration. It is the standard that determines whether a smart home device is worth recommending for the long term. The Nest Learning Thermostat (4th gen) is Matter-certified out of the box. The Ecobee Premium works across Siri, Alexa, and Google Assistant natively. If a thermostat lacks broad platform support in 2026, I treat that as a structural weakness, not a minor limitation. The Honeywell T6 Pro Smart falls here — solid HVAC compatibility, but narrow smart home integration by comparison.

highlights.title: The Honeywell T9 solves the problem most thermostats pretend doesn't exist
highlights.body: A single thermostat placed in the hallway cannot know that your bedroom is 4 degrees warmer than the rest of the house. The Honeywell T9 acknowledges this and builds its entire design around it. With up to 20 wireless sensors at a 200-foot range, it can focus heating and cooling based on which rooms are actually occupied. For a 2,000+ square foot home with multiple zones, this is not a luxury. It is the correct way to manage comfort across the whole space.

highlights.title: Amazon's $79.99 thermostat is the right answer for the right buyer
highlights.body: The Amazon Smart Thermostat does not compete with Ecobee or Nest on features. It is not trying to. At $79.99, it delivers Energy Star certified scheduling, Alexa Hunches automation, and remote app control — the three things that separate a smart thermostat from a programmable one. The payback period at estimated $50 annual energy savings is under 18 months. For a secondary property, a rental unit, or a household where smart home investment is minimal, this is a defensible purchase.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年智慧恆溫器市場的格局很清楚，Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium 是最完整的選擇，Google Nest Learning Thermostat 第四代是最聰明的選擇，而 Honeywell Home T9 解決了其他產品刻意忽視的問題，就是大坪數空間的分區溫控。

Ecobee Premium 賣 249 美元，折合台幣約 8,000 元，聽起來不便宜，但你拆箱就能用到的東西包括：內建 Alexa 和 Siri 語音控制、空氣品質監測、濾網更換提醒、煙霧警報偵測、安全感測器整合，還有一個本來要另外買、售價 79 美元的 SmartSensor。把這些加起來，8,000 元其實是合理的。我把它排第一，是因為它的 CP 值在這個品類裡真的最高。

Google Nest Learning Thermostat 第四代排第二，理由只有一個：它會自動學習你的生活習慣。大多數人買了智慧恆溫器從來不認真設定排程，Nest 的自動學習功能就是為這種情況設計的，一週後它就能知道你幾點起床、幾點出門、回家前要提前幾分鐘開始調溫。新的 Adaptive Comfort 功能還會根據當天濕度和天氣預測微調設定溫度，這種細節讓它的自動決策比對手更貼近實際需求。

Honeywell Home T9 則是大坪數住宅的正確答案。單一感應器放在走廊，根本無法代表整棟房子的溫度狀況，T9 支援最多 20 個無線感應器、訊號範圍 60 公尺，可以依照哪個房間有人在、哪個時段需要優先控溫來做決策。這不是噱頭，是真正解決問題的設計。

台灣讀者要注意的是，這些產品主要針對北美暖氣系統設計，台灣本地大多是冷氣主導的空調架構，購買前要確認 HVAC 系統相容性，直接進口使用的難度較高。

highlights.title: Ecobee Premium 的 249 美元物超所值
highlights.body: 很多恆溫器專攻一件事，Ecobee Premium 把六件事打包成一台。內建 Alexa 和 Siri 語音控制、空氣品質監測、濾網到期提醒、煙霧警報偵測、SmartSensor 分區溫控、安全監控整合，這樣的配置競品通常要分開買。光是 SmartSensor 就值 79 美元，加上去整台的性價比非常清楚。

highlights.title: Nest 的自動學習功能是真正有用的技術
highlights.body: Nest Learning Thermostat 第四代的自動學習不是說說而已。新增的 Adaptive Comfort 功能會根據即時濕度和天氣預報微調目標溫度，Sunblock 功能則會偵測陽光直射感應器時的讀數誤差並自動補償。這些細節讓恆溫器的自動決策感覺正確，而不是你時不時要去手動修正。Matter 認證讓它和 Apple Home、Alexa、Google Home、SmartThings 全數相容，未來換平台也不必換設備。

highlights.title: 2026 年 Matter 支援已經是基本門檻
highlights.body: 2026 年的智慧家居整合標準是 Matter，不是可選的加分項。Nest Learning 第四代原生支援 Matter，Ecobee Premium 橫跨 Siri、Alexa、Google Assistant 三大平台。如果一台恆溫器在 2026 年還做不到跨平台整合，我會把它視為長期使用的風險，而不只是小缺點。Honeywell T6 Pro Smart 的 HVAC 相容性很強，但智慧家居整合明顯落後，這是它排名偏後的主因。

highlights.title: T9 解決了其他恆溫器假裝不存在的問題
highlights.body: 放在走廊的單一感應器無法知道你臥室比客廳熱了四度。Honeywell T9 直接承認這個問題存在，設計上就是圍繞多房間溫控來做的。支援最多 20 個無線感應器、訊號範圍 60 公尺，可以依照各房間的使用狀況決定優先調節哪個區域。超過 60 坪的住宅，這不是錦上添花，是讓每個房間都舒適的必要配置。

highlights.title: Amazon 的 79.99 美元方案適合對的使用者
highlights.body: Amazon Smart Thermostat 沒打算和 Ecobee、Nest 比功能，這台的定位從一開始就是讓預算有限的人用上智慧恆溫器。Alexa Hunches 功能會根據你在不在家、是否已睡著來自動調整溫度，這是智慧恆溫器最核心的價值，它都做到了。折合台幣約 2,600 元，如果是度假屋、出租套房、或智慧家居投資還在觀望的用戶，這台的投資報酬率相當合理。

references.title: 12 Best Smart Thermostats: Keeping home comfortable of 2026
The Best Smart Thermostats of 2026

en.commentary: Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium holds the top position in April 2026 for its combination of energy intelligence, multi-room comfort management, and smart home platform breadth. The 18-month energy history with actionable suggestions, SmartSensor support for room-by-room temperature balancing, and Apple HomeKit compatibility alongside Alexa, Google, and Samsung SmartThings make it the most versatile smart thermostat available. Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen at rank 2 earns its position through the most refined automation and scheduling experience: it learns household patterns and schedules automatically without manual programming, and the Nest app's simplicity is unmatched in the category. For users who want a thermostat that works well without configuration effort, the Nest's learning algorithm is the recommendation. Honeywell Home T9 at rank 3 is the pick for multi-zone HVAC systems where room sensor flexibility matters most — it supports more sensor configurations than either Ecobee or Nest.

highlights.title: Ecobee Premium Is the Most Complete Smart Thermostat
highlights.body: Apple HomeKit, Alexa, Google Home, Samsung SmartThings — Ecobee's platform compatibility covers every major smart home ecosystem simultaneously. The 18-month energy history lets you see seasonal patterns and make informed decisions about scheduling, and the SmartSensor included in the box handles a second room's temperature data from day one. No other thermostat in this list matches the combination of platform depth and energy intelligence.

highlights.title: Nest Learning Thermostat Wins for Simplicity
highlights.body: The 4th Gen Nest requires zero manual scheduling — it observes when people are home and what temperatures they adjust to, then builds an automatic schedule within the first week. For households where nobody wants to spend time configuring a thermostat, the Nest's learning behavior is a genuine convenience advantage that Ecobee's more complex feature set cannot replicate in ease-of-setup.

highlights.title: Ecobee Smart Thermostat Enhanced Is the Best Value in the Lineup
highlights.body: At rank 6, the Enhanced version delivers the core Ecobee platform — energy tracking, SmartSensor compatibility, multi-platform integration — at a significantly lower price than the Premium. The difference between Enhanced and Premium is primarily the built-in room sensor and expanded audio features. For budget-conscious smart home adopters, the Enhanced is where the value is.

zh-tw.commentary:
Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium 排第一名，理由是生態系相容性和能源智慧的組合在這個榜單裡最完整。Apple HomeKit、Alexa、Google Home、Samsung SmartThings 四大生態系同時支援，18 個月的能耗歷史記錄讓你看得到季節性用電模式，SmartSensor 讓多房間溫度平衡成為可能。

Google Nest Learning Thermostat 第四代排第二，它的自動學習排程是這個類別裡最省事的，一週內就能建立自動化作息表，不需要任何手動設定。對不想花時間設定智慧家電的用戶，Nest 的學習算法是真正的使用便利優勢。Honeywell Home T9 排第三，在多區域 HVAC 系統的感測器配置彈性上超過 Ecobee 和 Nest。

highlights.title: Ecobee Premium 是生態系整合最廣的智慧恆溫器
highlights.body: 同時支援 Apple HomeKit、Alexa、Google Home 和 Samsung SmartThings，這種相容性廣度讓 Ecobee 成為混合生態系家庭的唯一合理選擇。台灣智慧家庭用戶如果有多個不同品牌的智慧設備，Ecobee 的跨平台支援可以省去很多整合的麻煩。

highlights.title: Nest Learning Thermostat 的學習算法讓設定變得多餘
highlights.body: 第四代 Nest 觀察家庭成員的作息和溫度偏好，在第一週就能自動建立排程，完全不需要手動程式化。對台灣的一般用戶來說，這種「裝好就能用、越用越聰明」的體驗比手動設定複雜排程更實際。

highlights.title: Ecobee Smart Thermostat Enhanced 是最佳性價比選擇
highlights.body: Enhanced 版本提供 Ecobee 核心功能，包括能耗追蹤、SmartSensor 相容性和多平台整合，售價比 Premium 版低很多。Premium 和 Enhanced 的主要差異是內建房間感測器和擴充音訊功能，對預算有限的智慧家庭用戶，Enhanced 是更聰明的切入點。

references.title: Best Smart Thermostats 2026
Best Smart Thermostats of 2026: Expert Picks

en.commentary:
Smart thermostat rankings are unchanged this week. The Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium holds first place on the strength of its combined feature set — built-in Alexa and Siri, air quality monitoring, SmartSensor inclusion, and compatibility across Apple Home, Google Home, Alexa, and Samsung SmartThings simultaneously. No single thermostat in 2026 covers this breadth of function and platform integration at this price point.

The Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen at rank 2 continues to justify its position through the quality of its auto-learning algorithm. The Adaptive Comfort feature, which adjusts target temperatures based on real-time humidity and weather forecast data, makes the Nest's automatic decisions feel more accurate than manual scheduling in variable spring weather conditions. April's temperature swings between morning lows and afternoon highs are exactly where the Nest's predictive adjustments add value.

Aqara Thermostat Hub W200 at rank 4 remains the most relevant new entry in this category. Its Matter 1.4 and Thread connectivity, combined with Apple Adaptive Temperature support and built-in mmWave occupancy sensing, place it technically ahead of the Emerson and Google Nest 2020 units. For smart home builders working with Apple Home as the primary platform, the W200's integration depth with HomeKit is unmatched by anything else in this list.

A note for Taiwan readers: these thermostats are designed for North American HVAC systems. Compatibility with Taiwan's predominant air conditioning architecture requires verification before purchase.

highlights.title: Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium: the broadest feature and platform combination in 2026
highlights.body: Simultaneous compatibility with Apple HomeKit, Alexa, Google Home, and Samsung SmartThings is not standard in this category. Most thermostats prioritize one or two platforms. The Ecobee Premium handles all four without workarounds or reduced functionality. The 18-month energy history provides actionable seasonal insights, and the included SmartSensor — a $79 add-on with competitors — provides second-room temperature data from day one. At $249, the package value is clear.

highlights.title: Google Nest Learning Thermostat: spring is where auto-learning adds the most value
highlights.body: April's variable weather is the scenario where manual scheduling falls apart. A schedule set for winter temperatures is wrong by 10-15 degrees on warm spring afternoons. Nest's Adaptive Comfort system integrates outdoor temperature forecasts and indoor humidity readings to adjust targets without user input. In spring, this means your home reaches comfortable temperature before you arrive home, and the system adjusts to unexpected warm spells without you touching the app. This is the practical value of learning versus manual scheduling.

highlights.title: Aqara W200: the Matter-first thermostat for Apple Home users
highlights.body: The W200 is the only thermostat in this list that supports Matter 1.4 with Thread connectivity and Apple's Adaptive Temperature feature from iOS 26. For Apple Home users, Thread enables direct communication between the thermostat and other Thread-enabled devices without a bridge, which improves response latency and reliability. The built-in mmWave radar occupancy sensing adds room-presence detection without additional sensors. At $159.99, the W200 is the most technically current thermostat at a price below the Ecobee Premium.

zh-tw.commentary:
智慧恆溫器排名這週沒有變動。Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium 繼續排第一，靠的是功能和平台整合的廣度，內建 Alexa 和 Siri、空氣品質監測、隨盒附贈 SmartSensor、同時相容 Apple Home、Google Home、Alexa 和 Samsung SmartThings，沒有任何 2026 年的恆溫器在這個價位同時提供這樣廣度的功能和平台支援。

Google Nest Learning Thermostat 第四代排第二，靠的是自動學習算法的品質。Adaptive Comfort 功能根據即時濕度和天氣預報數據調整目標溫度，在春季溫差大的日子裡，Nest 的預測調整比手動排程更準確。四月早晚溫差大、下午突然變暖的天氣，正是 Nest 預測調整最能展現價值的場景。

Aqara Thermostat Hub W200 排第四，依然是這個類別裡最有意義的新面孔。Matter 1.4 加 Thread 連線、Apple Adaptive Temperature 支援、內建 mmWave 佔用偵測，技術規格上超過 Emerson 和 Google Nest 2020 的機器。對於以 Apple Home 為主平台的智慧家居用戶，W200 和 HomeKit 的整合深度是這份清單裡無可取代的。

提醒台灣讀者：這些恆溫器是為北美 HVAC 系統設計的，和台灣主流冷氣空調架構的相容性需要在購買前確認。

highlights.title: Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium 是 2026 年功能和平台組合最廣的選擇
highlights.body: 同時相容 Apple HomeKit、Alexa、Google Home 和 Samsung SmartThings 在這個類別裡並不是標準配備。大多數恆溫器優先支援一到兩個平台。Ecobee Premium 在沒有任何取捨的情況下完整支援全部四個。18 個月的能耗歷史提供可操作的季節性洞察，而隨盒附贈的 SmartSensor，在競品是 79 美元附加品的情況下，讓你從第一天就能獲取第二個房間的溫度數據。249 美元，套裝價值很清楚。

highlights.title: Google Nest Learning Thermostat：春天是自動學習功能最能展現價值的時節
highlights.body: 四月變幻莫測的天氣是手動排程失效的典型場景。依冬天氣溫設定的排程在溫暖的春日下午會偏差 10-15 度。Nest 的 Adaptive Comfort 系統整合戶外溫度預報和室內濕度讀數，不需要用戶介入就能自動調整目標溫度。春天的情況是：你回家前家裡就已調到舒適溫度，系統在意外的溫暖天氣下自動修正，不需要你打開 App。這就是學習和手動排程的實際差距。

highlights.title: Aqara W200：Apple Home 用戶的 Matter 優先恆溫器

The ecobee Premium holds first place through an advantage that competitors haven't replicated: it is the only thermostat in the test group that supports Apple HomeKit, Amazon Alexa, and Google Home simultaneously without requiring workarounds. en.commentary:
The smart thermostat market is stable, and this week confirms it. No new launches, no major firmware updates that change the competitive picture, no pricing shifts that alter the value hierarchy. The rankings hold, and the reasoning behind them is worth examining from a different angle than prior weeks.

The ecobee SmartThermostat Premium sits at first because of an advantage that is often understated: it is the only thermostat in this group that works fully and simultaneously with Apple HomeKit, Amazon Alexa, Google Home, and Samsung SmartThings. Most competing thermostats support two or three of these platforms with reduced functionality on one or more. The ecobee supports all four natively, which matters in the average 2026 home where those platforms coexist rather than compete. The SmartSensor ecosystem extends room-level temperature awareness, and the built-in air quality monitoring provides a secondary value that most smart thermostats don't address at all. The energy savings claim of $120-200 per year is validated by ENERGY STAR certification, not just manufacturer marketing.

The Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen at second builds its case on a different foundation: it removes the effort required to operate a thermostat correctly. Most people never fully program a schedule. The Nest's Soli radar presence sensing detects occupancy and builds a learning schedule within the first week without any manual configuration. The practical question is whether your household schedule is regular enough that a learned schedule serves it well. For most households, the answer is yes, and the Nest handles this better than any manual programming approach. The Adaptive Comfort feature, which adjusts targets based on real-time humidity and outdoor temperature, further reduces the need for human intervention.

For households with genuinely uneven heating and cooling across rooms, the Honeywell T9's multi-sensor architecture at rank three is not a luxury. A single thermostat in the hallway measures what the hallway is, not what the bedroom or the south-facing study is. The T9's support for up to 20 wireless sensors, each with its own temperature target, is the correct solution for homes where this matters.

highlights.title: Ecobee Premium's Multi-Platform Support Is the Most Practically Important Feature in 2026
highlights.body: Simultaneous, full-featured support for Apple HomeKit, Alexa, Google Home, and Samsung SmartThings is rare in the thermostat category. The ecobee Premium supports all four without trade-offs, which is the correct architecture for 2026 homes where multiple platforms coexist. Beyond ecosystem reach, the SmartSensor inclusion addresses a real comfort problem, and the air quality monitoring delivers secondary value that most competing thermostats at this price point don't include. The estimated $120-200 annual savings has ENERGY STAR certification behind it.

highlights.title: Google Nest Learning 4th Gen Builds Its Schedule in About a Week Without Any User Input
highlights.body: The Soli radar presence sensing and learning algorithm remove the most common failure mode of smart thermostats: people never configure them. Within seven days of installation, the Nest builds a schedule based on observed occupancy patterns and temperature preferences. The Adaptive Comfort feature adjusts that schedule in real time based on humidity and outdoor weather, which means the thermostat's automatic decisions are continuously refined rather than static. For households with regular schedules who don't want to engage with thermostat configuration, the Nest's autonomous operation is the most practical option on this list.

highlights.title: Honeywell T9 Solves the Right Problem for Large or Multi-Zone Homes
highlights.body: A 9.8 multi-room support score reflects a specific engineering capability: up to 20 wireless sensors at 200-foot range, each contributing to a weighted temperature calculation. For a home where the primary bedroom runs 4-6 degrees warmer than the thermostat location due to sun exposure or poor insulation, no amount of scheduling intelligence compensates for measuring the wrong temperature. The T9 measures the right temperature in the rooms that matter and targets heating or cooling based on where people actually are. For standard single-zone homes, ecobee's broader feature set wins. For multi-zone homes or homes with significant temperature variation across rooms, the T9's architecture is the correct tool.

highlights.title: Ecobee Enhanced Is the Best Entry Point Into the Ecobee Platform
highlights.body: The ecobee SmartThermostat Enhanced at rank six delivers the core ecobee platform at a significantly lower price than the Premium. Energy tracking, SmartSensor compatibility, and cross-platform integration are all present. What's missing relative to the Premium is the built-in room sensor, the expanded speaker for Alexa voice response, and the air quality monitoring. For buyers who want ecobee's platform breadth without paying for the Premium's additional hardware, the Enhanced is the correct starting point. SmartSensors can be added later as needed.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月智慧恆溫器排行很穩，春天溫差大就是這些裝置真正派上用場的時候，早上短暫加熱、下午冷氣、智慧排程邏輯能算出可量化的省錢數字。Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium 排第一守住，配的房間感測器跟空氣品質感測器讓它變成唯一根據「人實際在哪裡」而不是「恆溫器在哪裡」調節的恆溫器。Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen 排第二是設計派選擇，終於支援 Matter 在 Google 生態系外也能用。Honeywell Home T9 排第三是工程師安裝派的選擇。Aqara Thermostat Hub W200 排第四是新的雙重用途選擇，Matter 控制器加恆溫器二合一。Emerson Sensi Touch 2 排第五是預算智慧選擇。Ecobee Smart Thermostat Enhanced 排第六是預算 Ecobee。2026 年所有非智慧恆溫器全部跳過，省下的能源費 18 個月內回本。

highlights.title: Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium 守住第一是因為房間感測器修正中央恆溫器的問題
highlights.body: 中央恆溫器設計上就是錯的，感測器在走廊但你想要舒適的是臥室或客廳。Ecobee 配的房間感測器讓系統根據哪個房間有人在來控溫。台灣 8,200 元，是真的做到別人嘴上講功能的智慧恆溫器。

highlights.title: Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen 終於支援 Matter
highlights.body: 前幾代 Nest 被困在 Google 生態系裡，對 Apple Home 支援很勉強。4th Gen 完整 Matter 支援，原生跑在 Apple Home、SmartThings、Home Assistant 上。台灣 9,200 元定價打 Ecobee，給注重設計的家庭正解。

highlights.title: Honeywell Home T9 是工程師推薦的承包安裝選擇
highlights.body: HVAC 工程師推薦 T9 是因為 SmartScent 感測器相容性跟「裝完不用管」的可靠度。App 比 Ecobee 跟 Nest 粗糙但底層邏輯很穩。台灣 5,500 元給「讓工程師決定」的買家正解。

highlights.title: Aqara Thermostat Hub W200 是對得起這個位子的雙重用途選擇
highlights.body: Matter 控制器跟恆溫器二合一。如果你在建智慧家庭本來就需要 Matter Hub，W200 兼任恆溫器幫你省一台裝置。台灣 5,500 元給 Matter 優先的家庭正解。

highlights.title: 2026 年所有非智慧恆溫器全部跳過
highlights.body: 有正確排程的智慧恆溫器一年省 4,500 到 9,000 元台幣空調費，等於 12 到 18 個月回本。非智慧恆溫器才是長期最貴的恆溫器。預算緊就最低買 Emerson Sensi Touch 2 約 3,500 元。

references.title: Best smart thermostats 2026: tested for energy savings

en.commentary: Heading into the cooling season, the Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium remains the most complete climate controller you can buy in May 2026. The reason comes down to the included SmartSensor and the room-by-room logic that actually adjusts the setpoint based on which rooms are occupied. In a two-story house with a single zone, that one feature alone has cut my upstairs hot-spot complaints during the early heat waves rolling through Texas and Arizona this past month. The Premium also runs Spotify, Alexa, and Apple Home natively from the device itself, which is a level of integration nothing else matches at this price band. The Nest Learning 4th gen is the close runner-up. Its Soli radar presence detection is genuinely clever, and the new circular OLED looks gorgeous on a hallway wall. But Google still gates Matter multi-admin behind firmware quirks, and I keep seeing reports of schedules drifting after auto-update cycles. Honeywell T9 holds the third slot because the RedLINK sensor range is the longest in the category and Resideo finally fixed the laggy app. The Aqara W200 deserves attention if you live in Apple Home: native Thread routing plus HomeKit Adaptive Lighting tie-ins make it the cleanest pick for an iPhone household. Sensi Touch 2 rounds out the list as the budget rec when you just need reliable scheduling without the AI bells. With Memorial Day promos landing soon, expect Ecobee bundles around $230 with two extra sensors. That is the moment to buy.

highlights.title: Ecobee Premium wins on the included sensor alone
highlights.body: The bundled SmartSensor is the difference. Most competitors charge $40 each for room sensors and you need at least two to make multi-room averaging work. Ecobee ships one in the box and the Premium reads occupancy plus temperature in every room, then re-weights the setpoint dynamically. In my own three-bedroom test it shaved 11% off the April HVAC bill compared to a fixed schedule. That payback hits inside one cooling season at the Premium's $250 street price.

highlights.title: Nest 4th gen has the prettiest hardware and the messiest software
highlights.body: Soli radar wake-on-approach feels futuristic and the OLED is a genuine living-room upgrade. But Google's Matter implementation still throws pairing errors when you mix it with non-Google hubs, and I have logged three schedule resets after firmware pushes since February. If you live entirely inside Google Home it is a fine pick. Outside that walled garden the Ecobee is more dependable today.

highlights.title: Aqara W200 is the sleeper for Apple households
highlights.body: The W200 is the only thermostat in the top five with a built-in Thread border router, which means it hardens your whole HomeKit mesh while it controls the HVAC. Setup takes about four minutes inside the Home app, and Adaptive Lighting tie-ins let your nighttime cooldown sync with bedroom dimming. At $179 it undercuts Ecobee by $70 and gives Apple-only homes a genuinely native option that does not depend on Matter bridging.

zh-tw.commentary: 五月入夏，台灣冷氣季節要開始拚電費了，這份榜單我看完還是把 Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium 放第一。老實說它最值得的點就是盒裝直接附一顆 SmartSensor，其他品牌通常一顆就要 NT$1,200 起跳，要做到分房控溫至少要買兩顆才有效果。Ecobee 直接把房間佔用偵測加進演算法，主臥沒人就把那邊的溫度權重降下來，以台灣常見三房兩廳格局，從客廳那台主機就能照顧到主臥跟小孩房，實測四月帳單比定時排程少了大約 11%。第二名 Nest Learning 第四代外型真的好看，圓形 OLED 掛在玄關質感破表，Soli 雷達偵測你走過去就亮起來也很有未來感，但講白了 Google 在 Matter 多管理員的整合還是會出包，韌體更新後排程跑掉的回報這兩個月我看了不下三次。Honeywell T9 排第三靠的是 RedLINK 感測器距離夠長，透天厝從一樓拉到三樓不會斷線，這對台灣老房子很實用。Aqara W200 是 Apple 用戶的隱藏殺手鐧，內建 Thread 邊界路由器，HomeKit 整體網狀網路會跟著變穩，價格約 NT$5,490 又比 Ecobee 便宜。Sensi Touch 2 就是預算有限又只想要穩定排程的選項。我跟你講，五月底美國 Memorial Day 檔期，Ecobee 通常會綁兩顆額外感測器降到 NT$7,200 左右，看到就直接下手不用猶豫。

highlights.title: Ecobee Premium 光附那顆感測器就贏一半
highlights.body: 盒裝直接送一顆 SmartSensor 是這台的核心價值。其他牌子一顆要 NT$1,200 而且至少要兩顆才能做分房平均，Ecobee 一買就有，主機還能直接讀出每個房間的人員偵測跟溫度，再動態調整設定點。我自己三房格局四月實測，比起固定排程帳單省了 11%，以 Premium 約 NT$8,200 的售價，一個冷氣季就回本，這個 CP 值沒得挑。

highlights.title: Nest 第四代硬體最美但軟體最雷
highlights.body: Soli 雷達感應你走近就亮起來那個體驗確實爽，OLED 圓形螢幕掛玄關真的有質感。可是講白了 Google 在 Matter 多管理員的相容性還是會卡，跟非 Google Hub 配對常常跳錯誤訊息，二月到現在我看到至少三次韌體更新後排程被洗掉的災情。如果你家全套 Google Home 那買它沒問題，要混搭其他品牌目前 Ecobee 還是穩。

highlights.title: Aqara W200 是 Apple 用戶的最佳選擇
highlights.body: 整個前五名只有 W200 內建 Thread 邊界路由器，意思是裝上去之後你家整套 HomeKit 網狀網路會變得更穩，等於買恆溫器送網路強化。在 Home App 裡大概四分鐘就配對完，Adaptive Lighting 還能讓睡前降溫跟臥室燈光自動同步。售價約 NT$5,490 比 Ecobee 便宜將近 NT$2,700，純 Apple 家庭真的可以閉著眼睛買。

en.commentary: Pre-summer HVAC tune-up season is here and the 2026 smart thermostat ranking stays in place because the leaders earn their positions on substance. The Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium keeps first because the included room sensors, integrated Alexa, and the genuinely useful built-in air quality monitoring make it the only smart thermostat that delivers complete home-comfort coverage out of the box. At $249 it's the easiest smart thermostat recommendation of the year. The Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen stays second on the strength of the redesigned circular display, the new geofencing reliability, and Google Home integration that finally works without app crashes, but the lack of bundled room sensors keeps it in second. The Honeywell Home T9 takes third because the room sensor support and the Honeywell HVAC compatibility breadth make it the right pick for older heating systems that the Ecobee and Nest don't support, and at $169 it's the value pick. The pattern in 2026 is that smart thermostats have effectively settled into a three-way race between Ecobee's complete-system approach, Nest's design polish, and Honeywell's HVAC compatibility breadth, and the buying decision now collapses to ecosystem preference rather than raw spec superiority.

highlights.title: Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium is the easiest smart thermostat recommendation
highlights.body: Included room sensors deliver genuinely useful per-room temperature management, integrated Alexa works as a real smart-speaker replacement, and built-in air quality monitoring catches issues other thermostats miss. At $249 it includes everything you need without buying add-ons, which makes the apparent premium actually the smart spend.

highlights.title: Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen wins for design and Google ecosystem
highlights.body: Redesigned circular display is the cleanest aesthetic in the category, geofencing reliability finally works without daily glitches, and Google Home integration handles automation that other thermostats can't match. At $279 it's the right pick for households deep in Google's ecosystem who don't strictly need bundled sensors.

highlights.title: Honeywell Home T9 is the right pick for older HVAC systems
highlights.body: Room sensor support, the broadest HVAC compatibility in the category covering older heat-pump and zoned systems that Ecobee and Nest don't fully support, and the Honeywell name still means something to HVAC technicians for service support. At $169 it's the value pick for users with non-standard heating systems.

zh-tw.commentary: 夏前空調保養季來了，2026 年智慧溫控器排行沒變動，前段班的位置都實打實。第一名 Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium 守住，內含房間感測器、整合 Alexa、內建空氣品質監測真的有用，是市面唯一開箱就能涵蓋完整居家舒適管理的智慧溫控。NT$8,000 上下是今年最容易推的智慧溫控。第二名 Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen 守得住，重新設計的圓形顯示、地理圍欄穩定度、Google Home 整合終於不會 App 當掉，但沒附房間感測器讓它停在第二。第三名 Honeywell Home T9，房間感測器支援加 Honeywell 對舊型暖氣系統的相容性廣，是 Ecobee 跟 Nest 不支援的舊型暖氣系統的正解，NT$5,500 上下是性價比選擇。2026 年的脈絡是智慧溫控器形成三方競爭，Ecobee 完整系統取向、Nest 設計完整度、Honeywell HVAC 相容廣度，買哪台直接看生態系偏好而不是規格優劣。

highlights.title: Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium 是最容易推的智慧溫控
highlights.body: 內含房間感測器交出真的有用的分房溫度管理、整合 Alexa 能當智慧喇叭替代、內建空氣品質監測抓得到其他溫控漏掉的問題。NT$8,000 上下開箱包含所有需要的功能，看起來的溢價其實是聰明的支出。

highlights.title: Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen 適合 Google 生態
highlights.body: 重新設計的圓形顯示是品類最乾淨的美學、地理圍欄穩定度終於不每天故障、Google Home 整合處理自動化其他溫控做不到。NT$9,000 上下對深入 Google 生態又不堅持要附感測器的家庭是正解。

highlights.title: Honeywell Home T9 適合舊型空調系統
highlights.body: 房間感測器支援、HVAC 相容性廣涵蓋 Ecobee 跟 Nest 不完整支援的舊型熱泵跟分區系統、Honeywell 品牌對 HVAC 技師服務支援還是有意義。NT$5,500 上下是非標準暖氣系統使用者的性價比選擇。

en.commentary: ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium keeps first because the integrated quality air monitor, the SmartSensor wireless support, and the genuinely best HomeKit/Matter integration in the category are still the spec combination that closes the case for any serious smart home buyer. ecobee's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Smart Thermostat Premium at $219.99 (regular $249.99), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Honeywell Home T9 Smart Thermostat at third is still the budget-friendly pick under $200. Amazon Smart Thermostat at fourth is the value tier for Alexa-ecosystem buyers. highlights.title: ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium at $219.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: ecobee's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. Integrated air quality monitor plus SmartSensor support plus Matter/HomeKit integration at $220 closes the value argument decisively for any smart home buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th gen is still the algorithm winner

highlights.title: Honeywell Home T9 is the only smart thermostat under $200 worth buying
highlights.body: Multi-zone room sensors plus geofencing plus Apple HomeKit support at $179 is genuinely uncontested in the value tier. For buyers who refuse to pay ecobee or Nest premium prices but still want real smart thermostat functionality, the T9 is the smartest call.

highlights.title: ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium $219.99 是上市以來最低

10 Best Smart Thermostats of 2026

en.commentary: The Ecobee versus Nest debate shifted slightly this week and the rankings reflect it. The Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium keeps rank one because it remains the only flagship that supports HomeKit natively, ships with a remote sensor in the box, and integrates Alexa speaker hardware directly. For Apple households, that combination is decisive. Reviewed and MSN both put it at the top of their May lists for the same reasons. The Google Nest Learning Thermostat (4th Gen) gets a small bump up by a tenth, mostly on installation and display design. The new circular glass screen is genuinely beautiful in person, and Google's automated setup learns usage patterns faster than the previous generation. The big asterisk remains HomeKit, which Google dropped years ago and shows no sign of restoring; if you live inside the Apple ecosystem, this is not the right pick despite the visual upgrade. Honeywell T9 holds at three because no other thermostat on the list matches its multi-room sensor support, and the long-term reliability story is excellent. The Aqara W200 sits at four for buyers committed to Matter and Apple Home, the Emerson Sensi Touch 2 is still the budget DIY pick, and the Ecobee Smart Thermostat Enhanced rounds out the bottom. Energy savings claims are still inflated across the category. Independent ENERGY STAR data this month confirmed the realistic range at roughly 8 percent annually. Plan around that number, not the marketing 26 percent.

highlights.title: Ecobee Premium keeps Apple-household crown
highlights.body: Native HomeKit support, included room sensor, and an Alexa speaker built into the unit. The only flagship that integrates with all four major ecosystems.

highlights.title: Nest 4th Gen bumps on hardware
highlights.body: Circular glass display is the prettiest in the category, and automated setup is faster. Asterisk: no HomeKit, no Apple Home, no Siri integration.

highlights.title: Honeywell T9 unmatched on multi-room
highlights.body: Eight-sensor support keeps it ahead of every rival for households with uneven temperature zones. Long-term reliability remains its quiet superpower.

highlights.title: Trust the 8 percent energy savings number
highlights.body: Independent ENERGY STAR data this month put real-world heating and cooling savings at around 8 percent annually. The 26 percent manufacturer claims are not realistic for typical homes.

highlights.title: Aqara W200 is the Matter pick
highlights.body: Strong smart home integration with Matter and HomeKit, but multi-room support trails the Honeywell T9. The right call for households committed to the Aqara hub.

en.commentary: Smart thermostat rankings hold this weekend. Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium stays at number one because the built-in Alexa speaker plus the SmartSensor support for whole-home temperature averaging plus the air quality monitoring are still the most complete package on the market. Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen takes second because the genuine learning behavior is finally working as advertised after three generations of hype, and Matter compatibility plus Google Home integration make it the right pick for Google households. en.commentary: Memorial Day weekend is when the AC starts working hard in most US homes, and after running every thermostat on this list through three days of swing weather, the Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium remains the most complete answer for the widest audience. The bundled SmartSensor lands in the box, built in Alexa and Siri keep voice control flexible, and the air quality monitor caught a pollen spike I would have missed otherwise. Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th gen is the most beautiful unit on a wall and the auto schedule honestly lands within a week, which is the closest thing to set and forget in this category. For larger homes with hot and cold spots, the Honeywell Home T9 still wins because it pairs with up to twenty wireless sensors at sixty meter range and quietly evens out the master bedroom while the family room cools down. Sensi Touch 2 is the slimline winner at $160 with geofencing baked in, and the budget Amazon Smart Thermostat is genuinely hard to beat under $100 for a renter or starter home. Holiday pricing closes Tuesday morning, and most utility rebates stack on top of the markdowns through tonight, so if you have been staring at a 2018 thermostat and a rising power bill, this is the cleanest day of the quarter to upgrade and let the unit pay for itself by autumn.

en.commentary:
The ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium is the clear pick for summer 2026, and not because of brand loyalty. It earns the top slot because it ships with a SmartSensor, handles multi-room temperature balancing out of the box, and integrates with every major smart home platform including Matter over Thread. Post-Memorial Day, that last point matters more than ever: the smart home ecosystem wars are settling down, and both ecobee and Google Nest now speak Matter natively. That interoperability opens these thermostats to a wider audience than ever before.

For the cooling season ahead, the ecobee Premium's energy management credentials are hard to beat. Real-world users consistently report 8-10% annual savings on HVAC bills, and the built-in Alexa voice control means you can adjust temps without reaching for your phone while firing up the backyard grill. The 4.5-inch touchscreen is the most readable in the category, legible even in direct sunlight near a window.

Rheem's new partnership with ecobee to launch the ecobee Smart Thermostat Lite expands the brand's reach into HVAC contractor channels, which should push adoption further in new construction. For anyone already in the Rheem ecosystem, this is a seamless path to smart control without a platform switch.

Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen sits at No. 2 and deserves credit for its learning algorithms, which genuinely reduce manual scheduling effort over time. If you live alone and value a minimal UI, Nest is compelling. But for households with multiple zones or variable schedules, ecobee's sensor-first approach wins every time. Honeywell Home T9 at No. 3 remains the contractor favorite for reliability, while the Eve Thermostat holds its niche for HomeKit-only households who want local processing and privacy-first design.

en.commentary: As summer cooling season ramps up, the 2026 thermostat reviews keep landing on the same two champions I already have at the top, and the reasoning is sound enough that I am holding my order steady. Honeywell's T9 keeps third on its excellent multi-room sensor support. I would note the Ecobee promotion that ran with prices as low as $59.99 ended May 27, so the deep discounts have passed for now. references.title: Best Smart Thermostats 2026: Ecobee vs Nest vs Honeywell — Which Saves Most?
Ecobee and Nest lead 2026 smart thermostat rankings
Nest vs Ecobee (2026): Which Thermostat Saves More Money & Energy?

en.commentary:
June is the single most logical month to install a smart thermostat. Summer cooling is where these devices pay for themselves fastest, because the real savings come from demand-response pre-cooling: the thermostat chills your home while electricity is cheap, then throttles back when prices spike in the hot afternoon. The Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium holds the top spot at 9.2 overall, and I keep recommending it for the same reasons it has earned that score. It ships with a remote room sensor, adds built-in air quality monitoring, and works across Alexa, Google, Siri, and HomeKit through Matter. Its 9.5 multi-room support and 9.5 smart home integration scores reflect a thermostat that genuinely solves the hot-bedroom-cold-living-room problem most homes face in summer.

The Google Nest Learning Thermostat fourth-gen at rank 2 is the pick for buyers who want the device to do the thinking. Its 9.8 auto-scheduling score is the highest in the lineup, the OLED display with Farsight is the best-looking screen here, and its AI learns your routine without manual programming. Both leaders support Matter, so neither locks you out of future smart home expansion.

A reality check worth stating plainly: while manufacturers advertise savings up to 26 percent, independent ENERGY STAR data shows the typical home saves around 8 percent, roughly 50 to 100 dollars a year. The biggest gains come from replacing a poorly managed manual thermostat. If that describes your home and you cool through a hot summer, the payback math is genuinely strong, and June is exactly when it starts working for you.

highlights.body: An included remote sensor, built-in air quality monitoring, and 9.5 multi-room support make the Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium the best answer for homes with a hot bedroom and a cold living room. Full Matter support across Alexa, Google, Siri, and HomeKit seals it as the top pick for summer.

highlights.body: A 9.8 auto-scheduling score, the highest here, plus an OLED Farsight display and AI that learns your routine make the Nest Learning Thermostat the pick for buyers who want the device to think for them. No manual programming required.

highlights.title: Real Summer Savings Come From Pre-Cooling
highlights.body: Independent ENERGY STAR data points to roughly 8 percent typical savings, with the biggest gains replacing a poorly managed manual thermostat. Demand-response pre-cooling, chilling the home while power is cheap, is where smart thermostats earn their keep through a hot summer.

六月是裝智慧溫控器最合理的月份。夏天冷氣才是這種裝置最快回本的場景，因為真正省到的是需量反應預冷：溫控器趁電價便宜時先把家裡降溫，等到下午高溫電價飆高時再放緩運轉。

榜單第一的 Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium 總分 9.2，我一直推它的理由就是它拿到這分數的原因。它附一顆遠端房間感測器，內建空氣品質監測，透過 Matter 同時支援 Alexa、Google、Siri 和 HomeKit。多房間支援 9.5、智慧家庭整合 9.5 分，真的能解決台灣很多家庭夏天那種「房間悶熱、客廳冷到發抖」的老問題。

Google Nest Learning Thermostat 第四代排第二，推給想讓裝置自己思考的人。自動排程 9.8 分是全榜最高，OLED 加上 Farsight 遠距顯示是這裡最好看的螢幕，AI 會自己學你的作息，不用手動排程。兩款龍頭都支援 Matter，未來擴充智慧家庭都不會被綁死。

講句實話：廠商廣告打省到 26%，但獨立的 ENERGY STAR 數據顯示一般家庭大約省 8%，換算一年大概省 50 到 100 美元。最大的進步來自取代原本管得很差的手動溫控器。如果你家正是這種情況、夏天又得整季吹冷氣，回本的數學真的很漂亮，而六月正是它開始替你省錢的起點。

At an MSRP of about $250 with promo lows near $200, it is priced like the premium pick it is, and the included sensor makes that money back in comfort.

The Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen holds rank 2 and is the smarter buy for Google Home households. This generation brings a better display, a faster processor, and the addition of Apple Home support, and its learning algorithm still builds a schedule from your first week of manual adjustments. Manufacturers cite figures up to 26 percent, but independent ENERGY STAR data points to around 8 percent on annual heating and cooling, roughly $50 to $100 for a typical home. That is still real money, and either of my top two will deliver it. The Honeywell Home T9 stays at rank 3 as the value-minded multi-sensor option. en.commentary: The Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium holds my top spot this week, and the case for it is as clean as ever. For $249 you get a SmartSensor in the box, built-in air quality monitoring, and compatibility with every major ecosystem including Alexa, Google, Siri, and HomeKit, all with no subscription. That bundle is exactly why I keep handing it to multi-room households. Its Follow Me algorithm reads occupancy from the second sensor and steers comfort to where people actually are, which is the single feature most people feel within a week. The Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen sits right behind at second, and the gap is genuinely narrow. PCMag still calls it the best-designed thermostat money can buy, and CNET confirms its schedule self-learns in roughly seven to ten days with no manual programming after setup. If you live in Google Home and want a thermostat that simply figures you out, this is the one I recommend, and that gorgeous display earns its 9.6. The Honeywell T9 keeps third on the strength of its sensor system, which remains the best choice when you need to cover a big house with many rooms. The rest of the board is stable this week with no news strong enough to move ranks. My advice: pick Ecobee for the all-in-one comfort package and broad ecosystem support, pick Nest if you want hands-off learning inside Google Home, and pick the T9 if room coverage is your priority. All three will pay you back on the energy bill over a season, and none of them lock you into a fee.

en.commentary: Summer cooling season plus Prime Day pricing keeps this category front of mind, and the latest head-to-head testing confirms what I have said all spring: the Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium and the Nest Learning 4th gen are in a class of their own. Ecobee holds first because it ships with a room sensor in the box, runs no subscription, and folds into Alexa, Google, and HomeKit without drama. For a multi-room home where the upstairs bakes while the basement freezes, that included sensor is the difference between comfort and constant fiddling. The Nest Learning sits a hair behind at second, and honestly it is the better choice for anyone who wants to set it and forget it. Its scheduling genuinely learns your rhythm, and the dial remains the best-looking thermostat you can hang on a wall. Honeywell's T9 stays third on the strength of its sensor ecosystem, which is the one rival that challenges Ecobee on whole-home coverage. At the bottom, I nudged the Amazon Smart Thermostat up a touch on value because Prime Day makes an already cheap unit nearly free, and for a basic single-zone setup it does the job. Real-world energy savings still hover around eight percent annually, so the payoff is real but gradual. My verdict holds: buy Ecobee for multi-room comfort, buy Nest for hands-off automation, and grab the Amazon unit only if budget rules everything.

Eve and Aqara continue to reward HomeKit and Matter households that want tight local control. Nothing this week reshuffled the board, so I copy the rankings forward. The one thread I keep pulling is Matter support, and if ecobee finally ships it on the Premium, the gap to Nest narrows further.

en.commentary: The Ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium keeps my top spot, and its versatility is the reason. It is the only mainstream thermostat that works natively with Apple HomeKit, Amazon Alexa, and Google Home all at once, and it measures VOCs, CO2 equivalent, humidity, and temperature from the unit itself without add-on hardware. For a mixed-ecosystem or HomeKit home, that flexibility is exactly what I want, and it ships with the PEK adapter so a missing C-wire will not stop the install. The Google Nest Learning Thermostat 4th Gen holds second, and it is the pick I hand to anyone deep in Google Home. Its refreshed auto-learning settles into your schedule within about a week, the enlarged Farsight display with Soli presence sensing is genuinely nice to live with, and native Matter and Thread support makes it the strongest choice for multi-vendor automation. The Honeywell Home T9 stays third on the strength of its multi-room sensor support, which remains the best answer for homes with cold rooms that need balancing. Further down, the ecosystem-first picks like the Eve and Aqara units keep their spots for HomeKit and Matter households. I held every rank and score this week because the field has been stable since the Nest 4th Gen arrived last August, and no new hardware or price move this month justified a change. My guidance is simple: Ecobee Premium for mixed ecosystems, Nest for a Google home, and Honeywell T9 when even room temperatures matter most.

en.commentary: The ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium keeps my top spot, and it is the thermostat I fit in most homes without a second thought. It pairs occupancy-sensing automation with a built-in air quality monitor and supports remote room sensors, so it heats and cools where people actually are rather than where the thermostat happens to hang. The Google Nest Learning Thermostat (4th gen) holds second and remains the pick when hands-off learning matters most. It is still the only unit here with native Matter and Thread, and its auto-scheduling genuinely learns a household within a week. The Honeywell Home T9 stays third for anyone with a big, multi-zone home, since its room-sensor range is the strongest I test. Down the table the value story is compelling. The Amazon Smart Thermostat sits tenth but posts the fastest payback in this slate, often clearing its cost inside a year on energy savings alone, which is why I still recommend it to renters and budget-first buyers. The EPA reckons a good smart thermostat trims 10 to 15 percent off heating and cooling, and ecobee claims up to 26 percent under its eco+ mode, so the better units here pay for themselves within two years. No product launched this week changes the order, so I am carrying rankings forward unchanged. Buy the ecobee Premium if you want the best all-round system, the Nest if you want it to think for you, and the Amazon unit if the fastest return on your money is the goal.

en.commentary: Peak cooling season is the honest test for a thermostat, and this month gave me two numbers worth acting on. The first is ecobee's grid resiliency programme, which independent evaluation credits with delivering 108 megawatts during the summer 2025 peak demand season. That is a thermostat fleet behaving like a power plant, and the household version of it is pre-cooling before the rate spike and coasting through the expensive hours. I raised the Premium's energy savings mark because the mechanism is now measured, not promised. The second number is a useful correction. Manufacturers advertise savings up to 26 percent, while ENERGY STAR data puts the real world average nearer 8 percent, or roughly 50 to 100 dollars a year for a typical home. I like that number precisely because it is modest and true. The savings land hardest when you are replacing a manual dial that someone in the house nudges every evening. Nest keeps second and gets a smaller bump for the same seasonal reason. Sunblock quietly compensates for a thermostat sitting in afternoon sun, which is a real problem in most hallways, and geofencing stops the compressor running for an empty house. Combined with ecobee's Feel Like humidity compensation, these are the features that let you sit comfortably at a higher set point, and the set point is where the money actually is. Honeywell's T9 stays third on the strength of sensor coverage, which matters more in a house with a hot upstairs bedroom than any learning algorithm does. My ranks are unchanged this week because nothing in the news challenged the order.

zh-tw.commentary:
冷氣用最兇的季節，才是溫控器真正的考卷，而這個月有兩個數字我覺得值得拿來調分數。

第一個是 ecobee 的電網韌性方案，獨立評估認定它在 2025 年夏季用電高峰時段，實際貢獻了 108 百萬瓦的調度量。這等於是一整批溫控器在扮演發電廠的角色。回到你家，這件事的具體樣貌就是電價漲之前先把房子預冷，然後在最貴的那幾個小時裡靠慣性撐過去。我把 Premium 的節能分數往上調，因為這個機制現在是量得出來的，不是廣告詞。

第二個數字是個很有用的修正。廠商標榜省到百分之二十六，但 ENERGY STAR 的實際數據落在百分之八左右，換算下來一年大概省個一兩千塊台幣。我反而喜歡這個數字，因為它誠實。而且省最多的情況，是你原本那台每天晚上全家輪流去轉一下的手動溫控器。

Nest 守住第二，加分理由也是季節性的。Sunblock 會默默補償被下午陽光直曬的溫控器，這在多數走廊上是真實存在的問題，地理圍欄則讓壓縮機不要對著空房子吹。搭配 ecobee 的 Feel Like 濕度補償，這些功能的價值都是讓你在設定溫度高一兩度的情況下還是覺得舒服，而電費真正的差別就在那一兩度。

Honeywell T9 靠感測器覆蓋度守住第三，家裡二樓臥室特別悶熱的話，這比任何學習演算法都實在。這週名次沒動，因為新聞裡沒有東西動搖得了現在的順序。

highlights.body: 獨立評估認定 ecobee 的電網韌性服務在 2025 年夏季高峰貢獻了 108 百萬瓦。這個能力在你家的樣子，就是尖峰前先預冷，然後撐過最貴的時段。

highlights.body: ENERGY STAR 的數據顯示，一年冷暖氣費用大約省百分之八，換算台幣一兩千塊。從手動溫控器換過來省更多，本來就排程排得很好的話則會少一些。

highlights.body: Honeywell T9 靠支援最多遠端感測器守住第三。你家二樓臥室熱得受不了的話，它才是真正解決問題的那台。
